record.field: Construction: Work Item - Set Work Item name
Construction: Work Item - Set unit cost and unit price from product
Construction: Work Item - Update related wi lines on product cost/price change
Construction: Work Item - Update product cost
Construction: Work Item - Update product price
Construction: Work Item - Update margin on price change if margin is fixed
for wi in records: wi['x_unit_margin'] = (wi.x_unit_price - wi.x_unit_cost) / wi.x_unit_cost if wi.x_unit_cost > 0 else False
Construction: Work Item - Update price on margin/cost change if margin is fixed
for wi in records: wi['x_unit_price'] = wi.x_unit_cost * (1 + wi.x_unit_margin)
for wi in records: wi['x_unit_price'] = sum(line.x_unit_price * line.x_quantity for line in wi.x_work_item_line_ids)
Construction: Work Item - Set as template
Construction: Work Item - Create new product for work item

for wi in records: new_product = env['product.product'].create({ 'name': wi.x_name, 'default_code': wi.x_reference, 'type': 'service', 'service_policy': "delivered_manual", 'list_price': wi.x_unit_price, 'standard_price': wi.x_unit_cost, 'uom_id': wi.x_unit_custom_id.id, }) wi.write({'x_product_id': new_product.id})
Construction: Work Item - Create/modify work item on sale order line
Construction: SOL - Create associated Work Item
Construction: SOL - Open SOL Work Item
Construction: Product - Archive Old Work Item Template
env['x_work_item'].search([("x_active", "!=", False), ("id", "not in", records.ids), ("x_product_id", "in", records.x_product_id.ids), ("x_is_template", "!=", False)]).write({'x_active': False})
